channel.title: Routing on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Routing on Margrop Blog

item.title: VPN Connected, But Internal Hostnames Won't Resolve? A Complete macOS Routing Table Walkthrough
item.description:
TL;DR:

When two VPNs run side-by-side on macOS (e.g. utun0 and utun15), an aggregate 10.0.0.0/8 route pushed by one of them can silently “swallow” every address in the 10.x.x.x range — including the one you actually wanted to reach on the other VPN. DNS resolves fine; TCP/ICMP just hangs. route -n get is the first knife you should reach for.
